name: Hershey's Light Chocolate Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly spray an 8-inch square baking pan with light vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt the corn oil spread. Add sugar and stir until well blended.
4. Remove from heat; stir in cocoa powder and vanilla extract.
5. Add egg substitute (or 2 lightly beaten egg whites) and stir to blend.
6. Stir in flour and walnuts. Pour batter into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until edges begin to pull away from sides of the pan.
8. Cool in pan on a wire rack. Sprinkle with powdered sugar over top.
9. Cut into 16 squares.
Per serving (1 square):
100 Calories, 3g fat, Cholesterol 0mg, Sodium 55mg.
